subtitle: Review recovered framing with explicit confidence edges before treating it like settled intent.

sections.title: Highest-Confidence Framing
sections.label: Recovered Framing
sections.why: Lead with the strongest recovered framing before reviewing weaker edges.

sections.title: Recovered Goals and Exclusions
sections.label: Recovered Scope Edge
sections.why: Show recovered scope intent as contrasts rather than one blended list.

sections.title: Recovered Actors and Personas
sections.label: Recovered Actors
sections.why: Keep named actors separate from weaker inferred framing.

sections.title: Recovered Decisions and Framing Claims
sections.label: Recovered Claim
sections.why: Keep recovered framing claims dense and evidence-aware.

sections.title: Weak Scope Edges and Evidence Gaps
sections.label: Evidence Gap
sections.why: Surface weakly supported recovered scope edges explicitly.

sections.title: Reconstruction Risks if Treated as Settled
sections.label: Risk
sections.why: Keep reviewers from over-trusting low-confidence framing.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.
